headline: TER Rides on Strong Semiconductor Test Segment: More Upside Ahead?
summary: Teradyne's SemiTest segment tops $1.1B in Q1 2026 as AI demand neared 70% of revenue, backed by new test platforms and upbeat Q2 sales guidance.
